'''Elaginn''' was the leader of the [[Elaginn gang]], a group of [[spice-jacker]]s who also included [[Romort Raort]] as a kneebreaker. Elaginn met with a terrible accident, jumping out of a [[Window/Legends|window]] after [[Flexi-paste|flexi-pasting]] himself to a chair. The incident forced Romort Raort to take over the gang, with Raort claiming that was the way that Elaginn would have wanted it.
